course_outcomes.LO1: Explain and implement core text processing and indexing methods including tokenization, stemming, and inverted indexes.
course_outcomes.LO2: Apply classical and probabilistic retrieval models including TF-IDF, BM25, and language models.
course_outcomes.LO3: Evaluate retrieval systems using standard IR metrics such as MAP, NDCG, precision, and recall.
course_outcomes.LO4: Analyze and compare ranking approaches including learning-to-rank and neural retrieval models.
course_outcomes.LO5: Build and evaluate an end-to-end information retrieval pipeline.
course_outcomes.LO6: Communicate IR methodology, experimental design, and findings clearly in written reports.

program_outcomes.SO1: Analyze a complex computing problem and apply principles of computing and other relevant disciplines to identify solutions.
program_outcomes.SO2: Design, implement, and evaluate a computing-based solution to meet a given set of computing requirements.
program_outcomes.SO3: Communicate effectively in a variety of professional contexts.
program_outcomes.SO6: Apply computer science theory and software development fundamentals to produce computing-based solutions.
